ddls:
CREATE TABLE "webservers" (
  "webserver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web server */,
  "input" TEXT /* Input string used to identify the web server */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the web server */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code returned by the web server */,
  "content_length" INTEGER /* Length of the content returned by the web server */,
  "tls_host" TEXT /* Hostname of the web server */,
  "tls_port" INTEGER /* Port number used by the web server */,
  "tls_certificate_status" TEXT /* Status of the TLS certificate (e.g., valid, expired, self-signed) */,
  "last_scan_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last scan */,
  "scanned_by" TEXT /* User who performed the last scan */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the web server is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("webserver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tls_certificates" (
  "tls_certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLS certificate */,
  "webserver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web server using the TLS certificate */,
  "tls_probe_status" INTEGER /* Status of the TLS probe (True if successful, False otherwise) */,
  "tls_tls_version" TEXT /* Version of the TLS protocol used */,
  "tls_cipher" TEXT /* Cipher suite used by the TLS connection */,
  "tls_not_before" TEXT /* Date and time the TLS certificate is valid from */,
  "tls_not_after" TEXT /* Date and time the TLS certificate is valid until */,
  "certificate_type" TEXT /* Type of the TLS certificate (e.g., DV, OV, EV) */,
  "certificate_authority" TEXT /* Certificate authority that issued the certificate */,
  "certificate_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the TLS certificate */,
  "is_self_signed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the certificate is self-signed */,
  "is_expired" INTEGER /* Indicates if the certificate has expired */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the TLS certificate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the certificate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the certificate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tls_certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tls_certificates_webserver_id FOREIGN KEY ("webserver_id") REFERENCES webservers ("webserver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tls_subjects" (
  "tls_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLS subject */,
  "tls_certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TLS certificate the subject belongs to */,
  "tls_subject_dn" TEXT /* Distinguished name of the TLS subject */,
  "tls_subject_cn" TEXT /* Common name of the TLS subject */,
  "tls_subject_org" TEXT /* Organization name of the TLS subject */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the TLS subject */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the TLS subject */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality of the TLS subject */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the TLS subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tls_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tls_subjects_tls_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tls_certificate_id") REFERENCES tls_certificates ("tls_certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tls_issuers" (
  "tls_issuer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLS issuer */,
  "tls_certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TLS certificate the issuer belongs to */,
  "tls_issuer_dn" TEXT /* Distinguished name of the TLS issuer */,
  "tls_issuer_cn" TEXT /* Common name of the TLS issuer */,
  "tls_issuer_org" TEXT /* Organization name of the TLS issuer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the TLS issuer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the TLS issuer */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality of the TLS issuer */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the TLS issuer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tls_issuer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tls_issuers_tls_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tls_certificate_id") REFERENCES tls_certificates ("tls_certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tls_fingerprints" (
  "tls_fingerprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLS fingerprint */,
  "tls_certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TLS certificate the fingerprint belongs to */,
  "tls_fingerprint_hash_md" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the TLS certificate */,
  "tls_fingerprint_hash_sha" TEXT /* SHA-1 hash of the TLS certificate */,
  "tls_fingerprint_hash_sha256" TEXT /* SHA-256 hash of the TLS certificate */,
  "tls_fingerprint_hash_sha512" TEXT /* SHA-512 hash of the TLS certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tls_fingerprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tls_fingerprints_tls_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tls_certificate_id") REFERENCES tls_certificates ("tls_certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tls_connections" (
  "tls_connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLS connection */,
  "tls_certificate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TLS certificate used in the connection */,
  "tls_tls_connection" TEXT /* Type of TLS connection established */,
  "tls_sni" TEXT /* Server Name Indication (SNI) used in the connection */,
  "tls_connection_status" TEXT /* Status of the TLS connection (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "tls_connection_time" INTEGER /* Time it took to establish the TLS connection (in milliseconds) */,
  "tls_server_name" TEXT /* Server name used in the connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tls_connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tls_connections_tls_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tls_certificate_id") REFERENCES tls_certificates ("tls_certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "webserver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web server the URL belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL scanned */,
  "scheme" TEXT /* Scheme used in the URL (e.g., http, https) */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number used in the URL */,
  "last_visited_date" TEXT /* Date and time the URL was last visited */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time it took to get a response from the URL (in milliseconds) */,
  "response_headers" TEXT /* Headers returned by the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_webserver_id FOREIGN KEY ("webserver_id") REFERENCES webservers ("webserver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "webservers_technologies" (
  "webservers_technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web server technology */,
  "webserver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web server the technology belongs to */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used by the web server (e.g., HSTS) */,
  "technology_version" TEXT /* Version of the technology */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the technology is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("webservers_technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_webservers_technologies_webserver_id FOREIGN KEY ("webserver_id") REFERENCES webservers ("webserver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the web server data */,
  "webserver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web server being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the web server data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time it took to process the access request (in milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_webserver_id FOREIGN KEY ("webserver_id") REFERENCES webservers ("webserver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favicon_hashes" (
  "favicon_hash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favicon hash */,
  "webserver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web server the favicon hash belongs to */,
  "favicon_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the favicon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the favicon hash was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the favicon hash was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favicon_hash_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favicon_hashes_webserver_id FOREIGN KEY ("webserver_id") REFERENCES webservers ("webserver_id")
)
